candidate_law: Local competence is not sufficient for global robustness

rows.result_title: Oracle decomposition works but learned local composition fails
rows.boundary_note: Structural feasibility does not transfer automatically to learned composition
rows.comments: Direct strong support: local correctness in principle does not guarantee global learned success

rows.result_title: Explicit carry-conditioned representation improves local behavior but rescues only one family
rows.boundary_note: Improved local competence still does not imply broad family-level robustness

rows.result_title: Strong local transition-aware performance still fails compositionally
rows.boundary_note: Even strong local metrics do not guarantee successful composition
rows.comments: One of the strongest supports for Law 1

rows.result_title: Carry-related direction is causally important for local arithmetic behavior
rows.boundary_note: Shows strong local causal structure, but does not itself guarantee family-level success

rows.result_title: Mechanistic structure is real but not globally sufficient
rows.boundary_note: Internal arithmetic structure can be real without complete family-level explanation

rows.result_title: Stepwise trace reveals local recurring failures driving global mismatch
rows.boundary_note: Local correctness is not uniformly enough for global exact success

rows.result_title: One trigger correction rescues one family but not another
rows.boundary_note: Fixing one local trigger is insufficient for universal family-level rescue

rows.result_title: Integrated architecture rescues multiple families through distinct mechanisms
rows.boundary_note: Architecture-level support is needed beyond local competence alone

rows.result_title: Rescue in higher-dimensional sandbox is itself family-sensitive
rows.boundary_note: Higher-dimensional composition still needs structured rescue logic
rows.comments: Supports extension of the law into richer spaces

notes: This is the first structured evidence-matrix test for Law 1.
It evaluates whether local competence repeatedly fails to scale into global robust compositional success.
